keywords.job: I am ambassador of our beloved king, Tibianus III.
keywords.name: I am Roderick of Thais, commoner.
keywords.elves: Though there are differences, I am sure we can live in peace and harmony with that noble race.
keywords.dwarfs: The dwarfs are verry dilligent and crafty people. Our contracts with kazordoon asure the best for both of our races.
keywords.kazordoon: The dwarfs are verry dilligent and crafty people. Our contracts with kazordoon asure the best for both of our races.
keywords.humans: Though there are differences to other races, I am sure we can live in peace and harmony with them.
keywords.troll: I heared about them working in the local mines. I am not sure if i like the concept of having such creatures within the walls of a city.
keywords.carlin: We are watching their relations with Ab'Denriel closely.
keywords.venore: The tradesmen of venore show great interest in trade cotracts with the elves.
keywords.cenath: I look forward to improve our relations with them.
keywords.kuridai: I look forward to improve our relations with them.
keywords.deraisim: I look forward to improve our relations with them.
keywords.abdaisim: Unfortunately I've had no contact with them yet.
keywords.teshial: They hardly seem more then an elven myth.
keywords.ferumbras: A threat to all free races.
keywords.crunor: I am not familiar enough with the different faithes to discuss them properly.
keywords.excalibug: A nice myth but nothing more.
keywords.news: We don't hear much at this place.
keywords.magic: I am impressed by the magic the elves are able to wield. Many of them can cast and even teach spells.
keywords.druid: The elven magic is somewhat similar to that of the druids.
keywords.sorcerer: Perhaps Thaian sorcerers can teach the elves their magic in exchange for knowledge of that noble race.
keywords.tibianus: Our beloved ruler seeks friendship and peace with the elves of Ab'Dendriel.
keywords.olrik: He is my servant and responsible for the mail. I wish he would not spent so much time with elven ladies and work harder.

texts: I am ambassador of our beloved king, Tibianus III.
